name: Onelogin Duplicate Account Emails
description: Detects duplicate active onelogin accounts sharing the same email identity.
query: SELECT LOWER(TRIM(u.email)) AS email, COUNT(*) AS account_count FROM onelogin_users u WHERE COALESCE(u.status, 0) = 1 AND COALESCE(TRIM(u.email), '') != '' GROUP BY LOWER(TRIM(u.email)) HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
remediation: Consolidate duplicate identities and remove unintended duplicate access paths.
